data.title: figma_node_mapper.py: effects and layoutMode fields not mapped to spatial-layout.json props
data.description: Completion verifier found DD2 gap: effects→props and layoutMode→responsive_hints are listed in the story done definition but not implemented in figma_node_mapper.py. Need to add effects from absoluteBoundingBox→props.effects and layoutMode→props.responsive_hints mapping in _map_single_node(). Requires RED tests first.
